description: Signal Dispatch topic backlog. Ideas worth exploring for future issues.

topics.title: The Linguistics of Crisis
topics.subtitle: How the Fed's vocabulary gap creates measurable information asymmetry
topics.hook: Goldman puts recession at 25%. Kalshi puts Powell SAYING recession at 28%. The market is pricing the distance between reality and institutional speech.
key_data: Powell: 0 uses of 'recession' in ~15 FOMC pressers since June 2022
March 2020: cut rates to zero, didn't say the word for 6 weeks
5 documented evasion patterns that operate below the verbatim threshold
Denial mechanism: 'we are not in a recession' triggers resolution
topics.notes: Broader pattern beyond the Fed -- every institution has vocabulary thresholds. Tracking the gap between language and data is SD's core methodology.

topics.title: What's Dying While Everyone Watches Iran
topics.subtitle: Five institutional failures compounding under wartime distraction
topics.notes: Published as SD Issue #4 on signaldsp.substack.com

topics.title: 2026 Recession Probability
topics.subtitle: Compound shock model -- four simultaneous stressors
topics.hook: Wall Street prices recession at 15-34%. Our compound shock model says 40-50%. The difference: they treat the shocks as independent. They're correlated.
key_data: Hormuz + tariffs + CRE maturity wall + DOGE cuts arriving simultaneously
Private credit shadow default rate doubled to 6.4-9.2%
February NFP: -92K. 2025 benchmark revision slashed job creation from 584K to 181K
Fed trapped: GDP 0.7%, core PCE 3.1%, can't cut, can't hike
topics.notes: Research mostly complete. Needs synthesis completion + draft.

topics.title: The Dollar's Quiet Retreat
topics.subtitle: BRICS payment rails, gold hoarding, SWF repositioning
topics.hook: Dollar-denominated risk is being quietly reduced by every sophisticated actor who can afford to reduce it, while the US government accumulates new dollar obligations to keep the oil flowing.
key_data: Central banks: 1,000+ tonnes gold/year for 3 consecutive years
BRICS Pay in operational trials at 20,000 TPS
Dollar reserve share: 65.3% (2016) to 57.4% (Q3 2024)
US now insurer of last resort for Gulf tanker traffic ($20B DFC program)

topics.title: The 2027 Harvest
topics.subtitle: The food crisis nobody sees coming
topics.hook: Hormuz cut 20-30% of global fertilizer trade. The crop price impact arrives late 2026-mid 2027. By the time it's visible, it's too late.
key_data: 318M people facing crisis-level hunger (double 2019)
WFP lost $2.6B from USAID closure, cut 6,000 jobs
UN declared 'global water bankruptcy' January 2026
Fertilizer-to-food-price lag: 6-12 months

topics.title: The Compound Shock
topics.subtitle: Stagflation thesis and prediction market mispricings
topics.hook: The market is running a demand-shock recession playbook. The reality is a supply-shock stagflation. Every instrument where that distinction matters is mispriced.
key_data: Kalshi recession at 34% vs our 50%
Fed rate cut count overpriced (market: 3-4 cuts, thesis: 0-1)
KRE puts: CRE maturity wall, shadow defaults doubled
TTF winter strip: EU gas storage at 29%, refill math failing
